files.headContent:
name: Docs review
'on':
  workflow_dispatch:
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  review:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@1111111111111111111111111111111111111111
      - uses: openai/codex-action@2222222222222222222222222222222222222222
        with:
          openai-api-key: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
          prompt: Review documentation links and wording only.
